_schema: task-ledger TEMPLATE for hsb-flash — set perk, fill record_store + the vars the perk declares.

vars.VERSION: <target FPGA version to flash to, e.g. 2510>
vars.REMOTE_ROOT: <remote working dir on the devkit, e.g. /home/nvidia>
vars.BOARD_TYPE: <board type: lattice or vb1940 — must be confirmed before flashing>
